creator: nbari@tequila.io
text:
This is the main reason of creating this port:


We strongly recommend using Basho's patched version of Erlang to install Riak 2.0. All of the patches in this version have been incorporated into later versions of the official Erlang/OTP release.

...If you do not use this version, you will not be able to use Riak's security features.


src: http://docs.basho.com/riak/latest/ops/building/installing/erlang/
